lookalikes.prompt: A woman in her early 30s, fair skin with a light smattering of freckles, jogging along a beach at sunrise, wearing athletic clothing. Her face is slightly heart-shaped with high cheekbones and a more defined jawline, and her long blonde hair with darker roots is parted off-center, gently swaying past her shoulders. She has slightly upturned, round brown eyes under subtly straighter, medium-thick eyebrows. Her nose is slightly aquiline with a narrow bridge, and her lips are thinner, forming a gentle, closed smile. Her expression is focused and serene, with her head angled slightly to the left. Full-body shot. Photographic, sharp focus, realistic skin texture.
